entries.text: Starting to document this properly. Building a digital growth agency from scratch вҖ” no clients yet, no playbook, just figuring out the first real steps: who I want to serve, what I can actually deliver, and how to get the first conversation.

Digital Growth Agency - Offering Website Development, Google Business Growth, Local SEO, Social Media Growth, AI Automation, Branding & Design, Content Creation, Reputation Management, Analytics & Reporting, Website Maintenance, Paid Advertising, Online Commerce.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
рҹ“Ҳ DAILY PROGRESS REPORT вҖ” SAKSHAM BASNET
рҹ“… Date: July 7, 2026
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

рҹ’Ў KNOWLEDGE I GAINED

вңЁ Learned that websites can generate recurring monthly income instead of being a one-time sale.

вңЁ Understood the difference between selling a website and selling business growth.

вңЁ Explored the complete range of services a Digital Growth Agency can offer.

вңЁ Learned the fundamentals of Meta Paid Advertising and how paid campaigns work.

вңЁ Realized AI can act as a business strategistвҖ”not just a website generator.

вңЁ Understood how agencies build recurring revenue through:
   вҖў Website Maintenance
   вҖў SEO Services
   вҖў Hosting
   вҖў Marketing Retainers
   вҖў Ongoing Business Support

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
рҹҺҜ DECISIONS I MADE
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

вҳ‘ Build a Digital Growth AgencyвҖ”not just a website business.

вҳ‘ Focus on helping local businesses increase customers and strengthen their online presence.

вҳ‘ Sell service packages instead of quoting only website prices.

вҳ‘ Continue mastering Paid Advertising as a core future service.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
рҹӣ пёҸ TASKS TO COMPLETE
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

вҳҗ Learn Meta Ads Manager in depth.

вҳҗ Learn Google Ads fundamentals.

вҳҗ Create a complete client onboarding process.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
рҹҡҖ LONG-TERM VISION
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

I don't want to become known as someone who builds websites.

I want to become the person businesses call when they want to grow.

Instead of hearing:

рҹ’» "He builds websites."

I want people to say:

рҹ“Ҳ "If you want your business to grow online, contact Saksham."

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
рҹ“қ DAILY REFLECTION
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Today wasn't about learning another technical skill.

Today was about defining the kind of company I want to build.

I now have a much clearer direction:

рҹҢҗ Build a Digital Growth Agency that combines:

вҖў Website Development
вҖў Digital Marketing
вҖў Paid Advertising
вҖў AI Automation
вҖў Branding
вҖў Business Growth Systems

The goal isn't simply to create websites.

The goal is to help businesses grow while building predictable, recurring monthly revenue for the agency.

Every skill I learn from this point forward should move me one step closer to that vision.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
вң… STATUS: PRODUCTIVE DAY
рҹҺҜ Mission Continues...
